arts.ttl: Everton vs Manchester United – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: David Moyes takes on his former side this weekend when Everton host Manchester United in the Premier League. Everton are on the up under Moyes, following his return to the club last month. The Scot has taken 13 points from his last five games to lift Everton away from the relegation places. arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes Manchester United transfer statement over free agents

arts.ttl: David Moyes wanted four key Man Utd transfers and even made Cristiano Ronaldo admission
arts.sum: David Moyes’ short time at Manchester United ended up being rather dismal, but if he got his way in the transfer market, things could have panned out differently for the Everton manager
